label: Caesar Debug Subscriber
info: Subscribes to retained Front and Back firmware JSON output.

name: Prepare FRONT SQLite row

sql: INSERT INTO cycle_data (layer, cycle, output, ok, ng, quota, isi, target, model, lot, operator_name, start_time, finish_time, received_at) VALUES ($layer, $cycle, $output, $ok, $ng, $quota, $isi, $target, $model, $lot, $operator_name, $start_time, $finish_time, $received_at)
name: Save FRONT SQLite
Prepare BACK SQLite row

sql: INSERT INTO cycle_data (layer, cycle, output, ok, ng, quota, isi, target, model, lot, operator_name, start_time, finish_time, received_at) VALUES ($layer, $cycle, $output, $ok, $ng, $quota, $isi, $target, $model, $lot, $operator_name, $start_time, $finish_time, $received_at)
name: Save BACK SQLite

sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cycle_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, layer TEXT NOT NULL, cycle INTEGER, output INTEGER, ok INTEGER, ng INTEGER, quota INTEGER, isi INTEGER, target INTEGER, model TEXT, lot TEXT, operator_name TEXT, start_time TEXT, finish_time TEXT, received_at TEXT NOT NULL)
name: Create cycle_data table
Install node-red-node-sqlite before deploying this flow
